title: onobrychis hirta
intro: Onobrychis hirta, also known as hairy broomcorn or hairy bird's-foot trefoil, is a perennial legume plant native to Eurasia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Onobrychis hirta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other minor ailments.
